sections.paragraph:
m. constr. חֶזְיֹון pl. חֶזְיֹונֹות-

(1) a vision, Job 4:13 7:14 20:8 .

(2) a revelation, 2Sa 7:17. גֵּי חִזָּיֹון Isa 22:5 (comp. ver. Isa 22:1), the valley of vision, or collectively of visions, i.e. Jerusalem as the seat and especial home of divine revelations ( Isa 2:3 Luk 13:33), perhaps with an allusion to הציזן (whence LXX. Σιών), or to מֹרִיָּה, which latter word is interpreted “the vision of Jehovah” ( Gen 22:2 2Ch 3:1). The city was situated in [on the side of] a valley.
